notes: AI-generated fake AZ Driver License (LN: EDWARDS, FN: KEISHA, DL: D96715905, address 19 CORWIN ROAD, BULLHEAD CITY AZ 86442, ISS 11/26/2020, EXP 11/26/2025, DOB 12/05/1995, HGT 5'-03", WGT 107 lb, EYES BRO, SEX F, Class C). Front only. AI synthesis per filename. Card appears Travel ID (gold star top right, Gen 2016-era marker). Same template family as forged_001 and forged_002. Critical structural violations: (1) E.3: under-65 Travel ID should have ~8-year validity; this card has 5-year span (ISS 11/26/2020 → EXP 11/26/2025), failing the rule. (2) M.9: validity doesn't agree with any valid Arizona card type — for DOB 1995 the standard 65th-birthday expiry would be 12/05/2060, and Travel ID under-65 should be ~8 years. Other tells not in tampered: (a) DD = '000000000000001551' — identical placeholder DD reused across forged_001/002/003 with different identities, a clear AI-generation fingerprint. (b) EXP date on ISS anniversary (11/26), not DOB anniversary (12/05). (c) Bullhead City AZ 86442 is a real Arizona ZIP — internally consistent. (d) Same Bullhead City address (86442) as forged_002 with different street — possibly indicates the generator pool draws from a small set of Arizona ZIPs. Source: Archive 2 / arizona_generated.photos_v3_0792508.png.
